summary: Iter 58 — Deep integration of Location Intelligence into Invest dashboard and Operate result page validated end-to-end. Backend 4/4 pytest passed (/api/location/provider still openstreetmap, /api/location/analyze for 'Koukaki, Athens, Greece' returns real Greek address + Greek POIs, cached path <3s, sources regression intact). Frontend confirmed: (1) standalone /location route REMOVED — react-router emits 'No routes matched location /location' and renders empty main, (2) Nav.jsx has no Location entry, (3) invest-section-location renders BETWEEN invest-section-why (y=807) and invest-detail-toggles (y=1582) on /invest/asset/demo after Thinking + Opener flow, (4) loc-section card shows 7.5 STRONG, address 'Κουκάκι, 1st District of Athens... Greece' (real Greece, not Georgia USA), 4 sub-score bars (Walkability 10.0, Tourism 10.0, Beach/Marina 0.0, Convenience 10.0), drivers ('1 min walk to 12+ restaurants', '7 min walk to Heroon of Mousaios', '7 min walk to metro (Syngrou-Fix)'), watch-out 'bars/clubs within 5 min walk', (5) Toggle nearest-places expands travel-summary with 7 categorized rows (restaurant/cafe/supermarket/metro/landmark/hospital/airport), (6) Footer reads 'SOURCED FROM OPENSTREETMAP · CACHED', (7) On /operate after demo flow, operate-result-location renders BETWEEN operate-result-market-position (y=986) and operate-result-nba (y=1999) with identical premium card + Greek address. Regression: /portfolio/demo and /dashboard/demo still render correctly.

issues: Visiting /location now renders an empty <main> between Nav and Footer (no catch-all 404 / fallback / redirect-to-landing). The console logs 'No routes matched location /location' warning. Spec asked for redirect to 404/fallback/landing — currently it is just blank. Non-blocking but unpolished if a user has the old URL bookmarked.

action_items: Optional: add a catch-all <Route path='*' element={<Navigate to='/' />} /> (or a 404 page) in App.js so legacy /location URL gracefully redirects instead of rendering an empty main.

Optional: travel-summary returned 7 categories (no beach/marina/pharmacy rows for Koukaki). Since Koukaki is inland this is semantically correct; consider showing 'no nearby beach/marina found' placeholder rows if completeness matters to investors.
critical_code_review_comments: LocationIntelligenceSection.jsx (~413 lines) is well under the 700-line cap and cleanly factored into LocationCard, LocationSkeleton, ScoreRow sub-components.
buildAddressFromInput TLD map is hardcoded inside the component — fine for now, but if more locales are needed consider lifting to /app/frontend/src/lib/countryFromUrl.js for reuse.

The embedded section auto-fetches POST /api/location/analyze on mount for every render of Invest/Operate. Since location_cache is hit (<200ms) this is fine; if Athens cache ever evicts, the cold path could add 5–30s to dashboard render. Consider keeping a server-side preload for demo input or showing the skeleton inline (already done).
Backend /api/location/analyze with invalid address still returns 502 (pre-existing from iter57). Non-blocking, still graceful.
test_credentials: None — all routes tested are public demo routes.
seed_data_creation: Koukaki, Athens, Greece confirmed warm in location_cache (cached=true on both Invest and Operate auto-fetch; backend cache-hit pytest confirms <3s).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 58 is green. Embedded Location Intelligence testids: invest-section-location (Invest top-level wrapper), operate-result-location (Operate result wrapper), and inside both → loc-section, loc-section-score, loc-section-verdict, loc-section-address, loc-section-sub-{walkability|tourism|beach|convenience}, loc-section-drivers, loc-section-weaknesses, loc-section-toggle-details, loc-section-travel-summary, loc-section-travel-row-{category}, loc-section-skeleton, loc-section-error. Cinematic timings: ~9.5s wait after navigation, then click invest-opener-continue-btn (force=True) on Invest, or operate-demo-btn → wait ~10s → operate-opener-continue-btn on Operate. Koukaki cache hit returns instantly so loc-section appears within 3s after dashboard render. /location route is REMOVED but no catch-all route was added — empty main renders. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_iter58_location_embed.py (4 tests, all pass).
